name: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Amazon Seller Central
snippet: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides AI agents with access to Amazon Seller Central data through the Amazon Selling Partner API (SP-API).

name: Amazon Seller Central: AI Agent Access to SP-API Data & Insights
snippet: The Amazon Seller Central tool functions as a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server, enabling AI agents to seamlessly interact with Amazon Seller Central.

name: Unlocking the power of Model Context Protocol (MCP) on AWS
snippet: The MCP is an open standard that creates a universal language for AI systems to communicate with external data sources, tools, and services.

name: SP-API MCP Server Documentation | MC - LobeHub
snippet: This document describes the Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for interacting with Amazon's Selling Partner API through natural language.
